name: miao-vision
description: AI-first local data visualization generator. Profile CSV/TSV/XLSX/JSON data, generate HTML reports with charts and evidence-backed insights, create browser slide decks, and turn articles into infographics.

interface.longDescription: Turn local data files (CSV, TSV, XLSX, JSON) into rich HTML reports with KPI cards, charts, tables, and evidence-backed insights. Create browser-presentable slide decks from data. Turn articles and Markdown into infographic artifacts. All local, no data upload.
